# MyPulseScan — Patient Health Record Intelligence

## About
MyPulseScan connects clinics to 320M+ US patient records in 30 seconds at the point of care — no forms, no faxing. Built for urgent care, primary care, and insurance-based practices.

## Core Capabilities
- Multi-network patient record aggregation (CommonWell, Carequality, TEFCA, Surescripts)
- Real pharmacy fill history — actual dispense records, not self-reported medications
- Patient match confidence scoring to eliminate wrong-patient liability
- Direct EMR push via Redox (Epic, Athena, eClinicalWorks, Cerner) — zero re-entry
- HIPAA audit trail on every record pull with treatment relationship attestation
- RPM billing automation (CPT 99453, 99454, 99457) — $1,140/enrolled patient/year

## Medicare Billing
MyPulseScan activates three Medicare CPT codes:
- CPT 99453: Device setup — $20 one-time per patient
- CPT 99454: Monthly device supply — $47/month per enrolled patient
- CPT 99457: Remote physiologic monitoring — $48/month per patient

A clinic enrolling 50 patients can generate approximately $5,700/month in additional Medicare revenue.

## Target Customers
- Urgent care clinics
- Primary care practices
- Insurance-based practices seeing Medicare patients
